title: Electro-optic imaging enables efficient wide-field fluorescence lifetime microscopy.
author: Bowman AJ Klopfer BB Juffmann T Kasevich MA
content: S-EPMC6783475 PMC6783475 Electro-optic imaging enables efficient wide-field fluorescence lifetime microscopy. Nanosecond temporal resolution enables new methods for wide-field imaging like time-of-flight, gated detection, and fluorescence lifetime. The optical efficiency of existing approaches
